target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle appears fully intact with no visible holes, scorch marks, or missing components; all major systems and armor appear undamaged; vehicle is actively moving, generating dust, indicating operational status.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: NO DAMAGE, CONFIRMED. The scene depicts a single armored military vehicle actively moving along a dirt road in a hilly, vegetated terrain, kicking up dust as it advances. The vehicle’s operational status and intact condition suggest it is functioning normally with no visible damage.
